components.value: V, S, M (a drop of your blood) V, S, M (a drop of your blood) V, S, M (a drop of your blood)

area.value: eidolon touched eidolon touched eidolon touched

description.value: This spell functions as lesser rejuvenate eidolon, except that it cures 3d10 points of damage +1 point per caster level (maximum +10). Rejuvenate Eidolon, Greater This spell functions as lesser rejuvenate eidolon, except that it cures 5d10 points of damage +1 point per caster level (maximum +20). Rejuvenate Eidolon, Lesser By laying your hand upon an eidolon, you cause its wounds to close and its form to solidify. This spell cures 1d10 points of damage +1 point per caster level (maximum +5).
